title: Bounded AI Delegated Post-Guidance Control Surface Refresh Execution
objective: Execute the next delegated dual-lane packet after Packet 837 publication by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while aligning the active execution plan, workspace authority framework, and Codex scaffold brief to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 837 governance stack and current next-step posture under explicit coordinator ownership.
dependency_note: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor, Packet 831 remains the delegated split-governance floor, Packet 832 remains the delegated operator prompt template floor, Packet 833 remains the delegated coordinator closeout template floor, Packet 834 remains the delegated packet-definition template floor, Packet 835 remains the higher-level orchestration entry-surface alignment floor, Packet 836 remains the active plan and authority control-surface alignment floor, and Packet 837 remains the live guidance-refresh floor. This packet reuses those preserved contracts to refresh the remaining active control surfaces so they explicitly preserve the Packet 837-aligned guidance posture rather than stopping at the earlier Packet 835 or Packet 836 wording.
required_inputs: The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md that the next truthful value is another delegated packet reusing the Packet 831 through Packet 834 stack with a new disjoint lane objective while preserving the Packet 835, Packet 836, and Packet 837 aligned surfaces
The delegated ownership, validation, and abort pattern in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-EXECUTION-CHECKLIST-2026-05-13.md
The reusable operator prompt structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-OPERATOR-PROMPT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The reusable coordinator closeout structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-COORDINATOR-CLOSEOUT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The reusable delegated packet-definition structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-PACKET-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The unchanged helper execution surface and focused truthfulness suite
constrained_outputs: One fresh Packet 838 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual

One disjoint control-surface refresh limited to plan/OLARES-AI-ORCHESTRATION-EXECUTION-PLAN-2026-05-10.md, docs/authority/OLARES-WORKSPACE-AUTHORITY-FRAMEWORK.md, and docs/operations/CODEX-AI-BACKBONE-FIRST-PASS-EXECUTION-BRIEF-2026-05-08.md
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 838 plus shared status-surface updates only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
An explicit ABORTED closeout instead of partial success if lane ownership drifts, the helper surface requires mutation, or validation fails

lane_a.name: helper-driven live host evidence lane
allowed_actions: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 838 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper
forbidden_actions: changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic

lane_b.name: post-guidance control-surface refresh lane
allowed_actions: align the active execution plan to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 837 governance stack and current next-step posture
align the workspace authority framework current proof floor to preserve the Packet 837 guidance-refresh floor alongside the earlier delegated packet floors
align the Codex scaffold brief so its preserved alignment note and done definition reflect the Packet 837-aligned guidance posture without changing admitted services or runtime boundaries
forbidden_actions: editing live artifact files under tests/canary
changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, admitted services, or business logic

required_combined_checks: both lane-level validation tuples are present
the live helper result is PASS for Packet 838
the host returns to truthful not-running rest state
authoritative-host parity is restored without widening scope

execution_gate: Ready after Packet 837 publication and authoritative-host parity restoration on 2026-05-14.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 838 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored at the same clean head using only the bounded generated-artifact blocker remediation authorized by the delegated checklist.
